name: agnt-connect
description: Terminal-style embedded chat panel with ASCII art branding, dropdown navigation, session management, and full orchestrator connectivity. Opens as an in-app panel with native AGNT dark theme design.
author: AGNT User

schema.title: AGNT Connect Panel
schema.description: Opens AGNT Connect — a full terminal-style embedded chat panel with ASCII art branding, dropdown navigation, session management, and streaming chat. Connects to the local AGNT orchestrator backend.

action.description: open = render the full Connect panel HTML widget. status = return connection info JSON.

sessionId.description: Session ID for the Connect chat session. Allows multiple independent sessions.

initialMessage.description: Optional initial message to send when the panel opens.

theme.description: Visual theme for the Connect panel.

html.description: Full HTML widget for the Connect panel (when action=open)

apiBase.description: AGNT API base URL the panel connects to
